Hi!
Here is update databases/mysql-connector-odbc to lastest version.

It works with default mysql version (5.6 now), but doesn't work with early version like 5.5. and 5.1.
I created a PR, but they don't care. http://bugs.mysql.com/bug.php?id=74706
